Name: Taurian Concordat
Description: The Taurian Concordat is one of the largest Periphery states, located rimward of Terra, beyond the Federated Suns. Founded and ruled by House Calderon, the Concordat prides itself on its independence, freedom, and stability. The Concordat is wealthy, well educated, and well armed for a Periphery state. The Taurians defend their independence fiercely against Inner Sphere aggression, particularly by the Federated Suns; they perceive House Davion's reputation as a protector of liberties as unwarranted and even hypocritical, and they have a long history of conflict with the much larger Successor State. The current ruler of the Concordat is Protector Thomas Calderon.
ReputationStatements: In an earlier era, House Calderon would have had you killed rather than offer you a contract. Unfortunately, we don't live in that earlier era. Accept or not; I don't care.

I dislike your kind, mercenary. But it seems that desperate times force compromises on all of us. Bear that in mind should you accept this contract: we offer it to you only because we have no other choice. Tread carefully.
Don’t expect us to smile politely while foreigners operate inside our borders. The job is simple, and the pay adequate. We know it to be within your capabilities as well.
Greetings, mercenary. This is a standard House Calderon security contract and we expect you to be able complete it. Try to look grateful.
Your battle-lance will fully comply with Concordat Defense Force requests during deployment. Know that we reward competence fairly and punish complacency.
Your company fights with distinction, Commander. We respect your prowess and commitment to Taurian sovereignty, this is reflected in your pay.
House Calderon would once again call upon you, our faithful Janissary, ready to wage war in our name wherever we ask. Join this fight on our behalf! As always, we value your loyalty.
MissionSuccessStatements: Another reminder that the Concordat is not some helpless Periphery backwater. Excellent work, Commander.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The Concordat survives setbacks because its people refuse to quit easily. Your company showed some of that spirit today.
BadFaithFailureStatements: I've hired raw cadets that have performed better than your company, Commander. In the future, you'd best operate at a higher level, or we might not be willing to offer you contracts aside from garrison duty.
